name: Flesh of The God Under the Mine

system.description: Pieces of divine flesh torn from the enormous pig-like head of The God Under the Mine embedded in the rock below Whitehaven. This regenerating meat confers incredible powers to those who consume it: superhuman strength, enhanced endurance, rapid healing, and the ability to transform into monstrous pig-headed beings. Arthur Browne discovered this flesh while trapped underground and has been feeding it to miners through Frank's slaughterhouse, creating an army of Pig Heads. The flesh can spawn grotesque tentacled abominations and grants temporary power boosts, but prolonged consumption leads to loss of control and mutation.
